items.headline: Aon Leadership Shifts Highlight Focus On Broking And Legacy Reinsurance
items.summary: Aon has appointed a new chief broking officer for its Global Broking Centre, signaling a refresh in its core broking leadership. The CEO of Aon Germany, a long-serving executive, is set to retire, prompting a change at the top of its German operations. The company is adding new senior executives to its global legacy reinsurance team as it builds out capabilities in legacy solutions. NYSE:AON is in focus as these leadership changes come while the stock trades around $335.17, with a return...
